Issues: Lack of unique artistic style: The portrait style, while appealing, is common in digital illustration, which can make it harder to stand out in a crowded market.
Commercial appeal is moderate: While the subject is attractive, the simple setup (portrait + generic text) requires strong marketing to achieve high sales viability.

Potential IP concerns: If the artwork was generated without proper licensing or if the style heavily mimics existing copyrighted artists, there are risks regarding intellectual property ownership and use.
Print Quality consideration: Ensuring the final resolution and file type meet commercial printing standards is crucial, which is an external factor.
